title: andrographis stellulata
intro: Andrographis stellulata, also known as 'King of Bitters,' is a plant species native to India and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Andrographis stellulata can be prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, including capsules, teas, and extracts, which are often used to promote overall well-being and combat various health conditions.
